evals.prompt: Review this authentication code for security vulnerabilities: [JWT stored in localStorage, no expiry check, password hashed with MD5]
evals.expected_output: Security review identifying all issues with severity ratings and concrete fixes

evals.prompt: 帮我做这段代码的安全审查，它处理用户上传的文件：[直接用原始文件名保存到服务器，没有类型检查，路径没有净化]
evals.expected_output: 安全问题清单：文件名注入/路径遍历/类型欺骗，各附修复方案

evals.prompt: I'm launching a fintech API. What security controls do I need before go-live? Give me a prioritized checklist.
evals.expected_output: Pre-launch security checklist: auth, input validation, rate limiting, logging, secrets management
